seoTitle: Wandown vs Wangandary — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wandown and Wangandary. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wandown and Wangandary.
heading: Wandown vs Wangandary — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wandown, Victoria and Wangandary, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wandown and Wangandary have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Wandown or Wangandary safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wandown has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Wangandary scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wandown scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Wangandary scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wandown or Wangandary?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wandown has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
